creator: FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz
text:
Created attachment 188881
maintainer update for graphics/opencolorio

update graphics/opencolorio

Add support for FLAVORS.
Update to commit 67e455b97e - this includes six of our patch files.
Remove patches as per above.
Add indirect dependancies.


Question for someone supporting mips64, powerpc64 or sparc64 - in regards to getting marked as broken, does the use of ${MACHINE_CPU:Msse2} to adjust OCIO_USE_SSE remove the sse2 flag? I don't recall why that was commented out earlier.
